parameters.description: CSRF token — required on all non-GET requests. Value is provided by the server.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password

post.description: Validates the OTP emailed after sign-in. On success, sets an HttpOnly `access_token` cookie that authenticates subsequent requests.

parameters.name: x-csrf-token
parameters.description: CSRF token — required on all non-GET requests. Value is provided by the server.

post.summary: Verify 2FA code and obtain session

post.description: Generates and emails a new OTP for the given address. Rate-limited.

parameters.name: x-csrf-token
parameters.description: CSRF token — required on all non-GET requests. Value is provided by the server.

post.summary: Resend 2FA code

post.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the access_token cookie.

parameters.name: x-csrf-token
parameters.description: CSRF token — required on all non-GET requests. Value is provided by the server.

post.summary: Sign out

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile. Requires a valid access_token cookie.

parameters.name: x-csrf-token
parameters.description: CSRF token — required on all non-GET requests. Value is provided by the server.

post.summary: Request a password reset link

parameters.name: x-csrf-token
parameters.description: CSRF token — required on all non-GET requests. Value is provided by the server.

post.summary: Reset password using a token

info.title: MedAlign Backend API
info.description:
MedAlign backend API. Authentication uses an HttpOnly `access_token` cookie set on POST /auth/2fa/verify. All non-GET requests require an `x-csrf-token` header matching the value returned by the CSRF middleware (CSRF is skipped when NODE_ENV=development).

## Local test seed data (run `pnpm seed:pj` against your local DB)

**Clinic portal logins** (password `SeedClinic1!` for both):
- `clinic-vitality@medalign-seed.example.com` — clinic `vitality-hormone-nyc`
- `clinic-apex@medalign-seed.example.com` — clinic `apex-peptide-telehealth`

**Superadmin login** (for `/admin/clinics*` and `/admin/patients*`): `superadmin@medalign-seed.example.com` / `SeedAdmin1!`

**Soft-deleted patient** (locked out of sign-in; use it to exercise the admin patient deleted-state and lockout paths): `patient-deleted@medalign-seed.example.com` / `SeedPatient1!`

**2FA:** in `NODE_ENV=development` the 6-digit code is printed to the server logs (LoggingEmailSender) instead of being emailed. Read it from the console and POST it to `/auth/2fa/verify` to obtain the session cookie.

For patient-flow testing, sign up a new user via POST /auth/signup, then submit an assessment (POST /assessments) to get a `sessionId` + `claimToken`.

email.description: User email address (this example is a seeded clinic user)
User email address to resend the 2FA code to
Email address to send reset link to

token.description: Raw reset token from the email link

webhookUrl.description: Set to null to clear the webhook URL

topServices.description: Service codes to mark as top/featured

webhookUrl.description: The HTTPS URL to test the webhook delivery against

contentType.description: MIME type of the logo image

count.description: Number of photo upload URLs to generate

path.description: Storage path returned by the sign endpoint, e.g. logos/<clinicId>/file.png

paths.description: Storage paths returned by the sign endpoint

isTopService.description: Whether this is a top/featured service

offersLabWork.description: Whether the clinic offers lab work

about.example: Specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy.

logoUrl.description: Public URL of the uploaded clinic logo

photoUrls.description: Public URLs of uploaded clinic photos

categories.description: Assessment category codes the clinic serves

contentType.description: MIME type of the logo image

count.description: Number of photo upload URLs to generate

denyReason.description: Reason shown to the applicant when denying

status.description: One of active, paused, suspended, inactive. An unrecognized value is ignored.

offersLabWork.description: Whether the clinic offers lab work

isListedInDirectory.description: Whether the clinic is listed in the public directory

logoUrl.description: Public URL of the clinic logo

paused.description: true pauses delivery unconditionally; false un-pauses only if currently paused.

body.example: Called clinic to confirm license renewal.

name.description: The patient's name (writes users.name, not a patients column)

dob.description: Date of birth (yyyy-MM-dd). An unparseable value is silently ignored.

billingEmail.description: Billing contact email. Synced to Stripe when changed.
